content: Lydia: This fucking elf party reeks of cheap perfume and Thalmor arrogance. You serving drinks to these knife-ears, or just bending over for them like the rest of your kind? Brelas: Excuse me? I’m just trying to make coin without getting grabbed by drunken Nords like that pig Erikur. Unlike you, swinging that sword around like it makes up for the fact you’re just Balgruuf’s glorified whore. Lydia: Watch your tongue, twig-licker, or I’ll split you in half and let the Draugr fuck your corpse. At least I serve the Dragonborn, not some prissy high elf bitch in a dress. Brelas: Oh, please. You’re so obsessed with MJR you probably crease your leathers every time he looks sideways. Tell me, does he actually fuck you, or do you just kneel there polishing his boots with your tongue? Lydia: Hah! You wish you got a taste of his Dragonborn cock. He makes me scream so loud even the Frost Trolls run. Bet you’re stuck jerking off malborn with your dirt-stained fingers in the dungeon later. Brelas: Malborn’s got more spine than you, you brainless wall of meat. At least he risks his life smuggling people out instead of simpering after some fantasy of being the perfect little housecarl. Lydia: Keep talking, bitch. Once MJR’s done kicking Thalmor ass, I’ll personally throw you to those bandit sluts hunting him. They’ll turn you into a four-way fuck toy before sunrise. Brelas: Try it, and I’ll slip Nightshade in your mead. Let’s see Dibella’s mighty warrior choke on her own vomit while the Falmer use your tits as punching bags.

Lydia: Pffft, you wouldn’t last two seconds in a real fight. Go back to wiping Elenwen’s ass and pretending you matter, twig-sister. I’ve got a dragonborn to ride. Brelas: And I’ve got a job to do—unlike you, who just follows MJR around like a horny skeever. Enjoy your delusions, brute. The drinks won’t serve themselves. Lydia: Fuck you and your drinks. Hope Erikur grabs your skinny elven ass again—maybe then you’ll finally get some action. Brelas: As if I’d ever let a sweaty Nord like him near me. Go swing your sword at something before it gets bored.
